items.title: Wie van de vijf? Deze namen worden genoemd als opvolger bij Anderlecht
items.summary: RSC Anderlecht is nog steeds op zoek naar een nieuwe Technisch Directeur. Die zal komende zomer mogelijk de rangen komen vervoegen bij paars-wit. Er is dan ook werk aan de winkel en er is nu (eindelijk) een shortlist.

items.title: Thomas van den Belt: 'Voetballers zijn mensen, wordt nog vaak vergeten'
items.summary: Thomas van den Belt (24) is een van de spelers van FC Twente die opbloeiden onder John van den Brom. De middenvelder vertelt over de impact van trainers op zijn prestaties, de opmars van de Enschedese club en de mentale belasting van het moderne voetbal. ‘Ik had geen nagel meer over na wedstrijden.’

items.title: Today on Sky Sports Racing: Knockamore and Despereaux clash at Hereford
items.summary: The Sky Sports Racing cameras head to Hereford on Wednesday afternoon, with all seven races live from 2pm.

items.title: 'Enough is enough!' - Ferrari insist no more changes to F1 start rules
items.summary: Ferrari team boss Frederic Vasseur believes it has got to the point where "enough is enough" in terms of changing Formula 1's race-start procedure.

items.title: Pas de miracle pour Chelsea et Manchester City, le PSG et le Real Madrid se qualifient pour les quarts de finale
items.summary: Il aurait fallu de sacrées performances à domicile pour les clubs anglais ce mardi s'ils voulaient inverser la tendance en 8e de finale de la Champions League. Chelsea et Manchester City sont donc éliminés.

items.title: Incroyable scénario : la CAF déclare le Maroc champion d'Afrique sur tapis vert !
items.summary: Le Sénégal n'est plus champion d'Afrique. La CAF, la confédération africaine de football, a été dans le sens de la plainte du Maroc suite aux événements de la finale de la CAN.

items.title: Heel wat spelers bedreigd: de puzzel van de schorsingen in de Pro League
items.summary: Heel wat spelers moeten vermijden om vóór de start van de Play-offs hun vijfde of tiende gele kaart te pakken, want na de 30e speeldag van de reguliere competitie worden de tellers weer op nul gezet.

items.title: Très bonne nouvelle : sorti en larmes, ce grand talent belge échappe à une grave blessure
items.summary: Ce lundi soir, Noah Fernandez, grand talent belge du PSV Eindhoven, était sorti en larmes et sur civière, victime de ce qu'on craignait être une grave blessure.

items.title: Morocco awarded Afcon title after CAF overturns result
items.summary: Morocco declared the winners of the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations after the Confederation of African Football overturns the result of their final defeat to Senegal.

items.title: Morocco given AFCON title after Senegal 'forfeit'
items.summary: Morocco was stunningly awarded the Africa Cup of Nations title on Tuesday by appeals judges who overturned Senegal's victory in a chaotic final in January.

items.title: Vinícius: Crying celebration aimed at Man City fans
items.summary: Vinícius Júnior said his "crying" celebration after scoring in Real Madrid's 2-1 win at Manchester City on Tuesday was a response to last season's "stop crying your heart out" banner from City fans.

items.title: Eze's 'magical moment' clinches Arsenal QF spot
items.summary: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta hailed Eberechi Eze's ability to create "magical moments" after his wondergoal against Bayer Leverkusen.

items.title: As Premier League sides crumble around them, Arsenal keep cruising closer to a quadruple
items.summary: Arsenal should feel the pressure as Premier League leaders. Instead, they look comfortable as a quadruple is in their sights.

items.title: Real Madrid deal latest blow to Guardiola's Champions League legacy
items.summary: For the third straight year, Manchester City were knocked out of Europe by Real Madrid.

items.title: Rice 'The Horse' epitomises relentless Arsenal
items.summary: Declan Rice is called "The Horse" by his Arsenal team-mates and his performance in the 2-0 win against Bayer Leverkusen again showed why he has more than earned that nickname.

items.title: Real Madrid defeat leaves Man City with season-defining run
items.summary: Manchester City's season stands on the brink following a demoralising Champions League exit at the hands of familiar foes Real Madrid.

items.title: Will Champions League be Guardiola's Man City regret?
items.summary: Pep Guardiola is one of the greatest managers of all time, but will his Champions League record be a cause for frustration?

items.title: Afrika Cup-helden Senegal reageren vol ongeloof op uitspraak Afrikaanse bond
items.summary: Het nieuws dat de Afrika Cup niet door Senegal, maar door Marokko is gewonnen , zorgt voor veel ongeloof in het land van de oorspronkelijke winnaar. Maanden na de finale is op basis van een juridisch verdict de uitslag aangepast. Al stapt Senegal naar het CAS om die uitspraak aan te vechten, zo lijkt het.

items.title: Sporting-trainer bijt van zich af na epische comeback: 'Ik verdien meer respect'
items.summary: Sporting Portugal-trainer Rui Borges heeft de persconferentie na de geweldige comeback tegen FK Bodø/Glimt aangegrepen om zijn gram te halen tegenover de buitenwereld. Volgens de 44-jarige Portugees kreeg zijn ploeg de afgelopen tijd veel te weinig respect.

items.title: Senegal stripped of Africa Cup of Nations title over walkout protest in final
items.summary: Morocco declared 3-0 winners after appeal is upheld Senegal’s players walked off pitch over penalty call Morocco have been awarded a 3-0 win in this year’s Africa Cup of Nations final after Senegal were sensationally stripped of the title in an unprecedented ruling. The Confederation of African Football announced on Tuesday evening that its appeal board had decided that Senegal are “declared to have forfeited the final” that was held in Rabat in January after the head coach, Pape Thiaw, and some of his players left the pitch for 15 minutes in protest at Morocco being awarded a penalty. They eventually returned after being implored to by the captain, Sadio Mané, with Brahim Díaz’s subsequent spot‑kick being saved to send the final into extra time, when Pape Gueye scored the winning goal. Continue reading...

items.title: Handdoek-schorsing Saibari flink ingekort, PSV'er inzetbaar in groepsfase WK
items.summary: Voor Ismael Saibari krijgt het onverwacht winnen van de Afrika Cup nog eens extra goed nieuws. De schorsing van de middenvelder van PSV wordt door de Afrikaanse bond teruggebracht naar twee duels, waarvan één voorwaardelijk. Aanvankelijk werd hem drie wedstrijden opgelegd voor zijn gedrag tijdens de finale tegen Senegal.

items.title: Bodo/Glimt's fairytale run comes to crashing halt
items.summary: Bodo/Glimt's dream run in this season's Champions League may be over, but they bow out with their heads held high after making history.

items.title: Robertson houdt vertrouwen in Slot: 'Hij probeert antwoorden te vinden'
items.summary: Andy Robertson blijft vertrouwen in zijn manager Arne Slot. De linksback van Liverpool ziet hoe de Nederlander antwoorden probeert te zoeken op de vele problemen bij The Reds .

items.title: Ruthless PSG condemn Chelsea to humiliating Champions League exit
items.summary: Chelsea huddled once and, as if in an act of resistance, huddled again. They gathered on either side of the centre-circle before kick-off, apparently impervious to the kerfuffle that had followed their weekend antics, and it was the biggest fight they put up on a night that laid bare their distance from Europe’s elite. The resounding Club World Cup win against Paris Saint-Germain was nothing more than a stateside summer fever dream: here, on the stage that really matters, they were humbled by opponents who belonged on a different pitch from the start. Continue reading...

items.title: Vinícius finishes off 10-man Manchester City as Real Madrid ease into last eight
items.summary: “In football anything is possible,” was Pep Guardiola’s rallying cry and while Manchester City failed to pull off a Lazarus act for the ages, this was a definite one-off wonder of a contest that thrilled all witnesses. Particularly, the first 45 minutes of mayhem headlined by Vinícius Júnior apparently being ruled offside by the referee, Clément Turpin, then onside, which meant Bernardo Silva was then penalised for handball, sent off, and the Brazilian then scored from the spot. Further entertainment also derived from a Guardiola yellow card, Erling Haaland’s equaliser, and a slew of goalmouth incident that mostly continued after the break – including late finishes from Rayan Aït-Nouri and Fede Valverde that were ruled offside, and one from Vinícius that counted. Continue reading...

items.title: Watford beat Wrexham to blow play-off race wide open
items.summary: Watford inflicted Wrexham’s first away defeat of the calendar year with a 3-1 victory to maintain their Sky Bet Championship play-off push.

items.title: Eze and Rice pick off Bayer Leverkusen as Arsenal cruise into quarter-finals
items.summary: Is there anyone who can stop Arsenal in this kind of form? The Bayer Leverkusen goalkeeper, Janis Blaswich, tried his best in a spectacular first-half performance that kept the Premier League leaders at bay until Eberechi Eze smashed in his first Champions League goal and Declan Rice completed a comfortable victory after the break to seal a third successive quarter‑final appearance. After yet another clinical performance in Europe yielded a ninth victory in 10 games this season, Mikel Arteta will certainly fancy Arsenal’s chances of getting past Sporting in the last eight despite the Portuguese side’s remarkable comeback against Bodø/Glimt that spared them a trip to the Arctic Circle. Continue reading...

items.title: Man City knocked out of Europe by Real Madrid AGAIN
items.summary: Manchester City have been knocked out of the Champions League in the round of 16 as Vinicius Jr scored twice in a 2-1 win for Real Madrid that sealed a 5-1 aggregate victory.

items.title: BREAKING: Senegal gestraft, Marokko krijgt dan toch nog de Afrika Cup cadeau
items.summary: Een stevig stukje theater. Veel meer kunnen we niet zeggen van wat er vandaag beslist is door de Afrikaanse voetbalbond. Die heeft Marokko alsnog de Afrika Cup cadeau gegeven, want Senegal is uitgesloten door een reglementsfout.

items.title: Alarmfase rood: beresterke Thibaut Courtois valt uit - deze teams door naar kwartfinales CL
items.summary: In de Champions League waren we klaar voor de terugwedstrijden in de achtste finales. Daarbij viel toch wel heel wat spektakel te noteren. En ook wat slecht nieuws over Thibaut Courtois, die geblesseerd uitviel.
